Uses of Class
me.kevinboone.caztor.base.ResponseContent

Packages that use ResponseContent
Package
Description
me.kevinboone.caztor.base
This package contains the interfaces that define the Caztor classes, along with some fundamental utilities for SSL, configuration management, and Filename processing.

  • Uses of ResponseContent in me.kevinboone.caztor.base

    Methods in me.kevinboone.caztor.base that return ResponseContent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ResponseContent
    ContentFetcher.fetch(String url)
    Like fetch (URL), but takes a String, and therefore has an additional mode of failure that the caller must anticipate.
    static ResponseContent
    ContentFetcher.fetch(URL url)
    Download from the specified URL, and store the result -- or the exception -- in a Responsecontent object.
